title: Trade lifecycle enumerations
description: Enumerations for the trade lifecycle domain

TradeStatus.description: Status of a trade in its lifecycle. INDICATIVE: initial interest expressed; terms are non-binding. NEGOTIATING: parties are actively negotiating trade terms. AGREED: trade terms have been agreed upon by all parties. PENDING_DOCUMENTATION: awaiting execution of legal documentation. PENDING_SETTLEMENT: documentation complete; awaiting settlement of funds and asset transfer. SETTLED: trade has been fully settled with funds and assets exchanged. CANCELLED: trade was voluntarily cancelled by one or more parties before settlement. FAILED: trade could not be completed due to an error, breach, or failed settlement.

PaymentMethod.description: Method of payment for trade settlement. WIRE: bank wire transfer for same-day or next-day settlement. ACH: Automated Clearing House electronic transfer, typically settling in 1-2 business days. CHECK: physical check payment. DTC: Depository Trust Company book-entry transfer for securities. IN_KIND: settlement via transfer of assets rather than cash.

SettlementStatus.description: Status of a settlement instruction. PENDING: settlement instruction has been created but not yet sent. INSTRUCTED: payment instructions have been sent to the relevant parties or banks. CONFIRMED: counterparty has confirmed receipt of settlement instructions. SETTLED: funds and/or assets have been successfully exchanged. FAILED: settlement could not be completed due to insufficient funds, incorrect details, or other errors. CANCELLED: settlement instruction was cancelled before execution.
